name: PGYTECH OneMo Sling 11L
description: The 11L OneMo Sling in gray camo from PGYTECH has an innovative structure and a large top opening for easy packing and organizing.

features.Key Features:: Holds Camera, Drone, iPad, and More | Large Top Opening, YKK Zippers | Expandable Design Increases Capacity | Multiple Sized Sleeves/Pockets | Space for a 16 oz Water Bottle | Tripod Strap on Bottom of Bag | Attach Camera Clips/Carabiners to Strap | Battery Storage/Power Indicator Pocket | Hidden AirTag Pocket
